name: NEWMARKET CORP
summary: NewMarket Corporation is a holding company whose subsidiaries manufacture and sell specialty chemicals. Afton Chemical produces petroleum additives (lubricant and fuel additives) sold globally to oil companies and blenders. Ethyl markets antiknock compounds in North America and performs contracted manufacturing. AMPAC manufactures specialty materials for solid rocket motors in aerospace and defense. Calca produces ultra-pure hydrazine for aerospace and defense propellant applications. NewMarket Development manages approximately 50 acres of Virginia real property.

products.name: Lubricant Additives
products.description: Formulated additive packages including detergents, dispersants, antiwear agents, viscosity modifiers, and antioxidants for engine oils, transmission, axle, and industrial fluids.

products.name: Fuel Additives
products.description: Chemical components and formulated packages that help refiners meet fuel specifications and improve performance of gasoline, diesel, and biofuels.

products.name: Antiknock Compounds
products.description: Marketed by Ethyl in North America; Ethyl also provides contracted manufacturing and related services to Afton and third parties.

products.name: Specialty Materials for Solid Rocket Motors
products.description: AMPAC manufactures specialty materials used in solid rocket motors for space launch and military defense applications.

products.name: Ultra Pure and High-Purity Hydrazine
products.description: Calca produces hydrazine products used as mission-critical propellants in aerospace and defense applications.
